title: SculkHorn3D
description: A texture pack for the Sculk Horn mod to make the Sculk horns 3D
body:
# SculkHorn3D

## Description
this texture pack makes the items added in Sculk Horn Mod look 3d

## Support
This resource pack is compatible with any version of the [Sculk Horn mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/-sculk-horn).

# ![Sculk Horn Area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pPdRHBeF/images/37ac8fc08ca0e53e21fc6bc5bee5650fccc95a2a.png)
